song_name: How Am I Supposed To Live Without You

versions.song_name: How Am I Supposed To Live Without You
How Am I Supposed To Live Without You

tuning: E A D G B E

pro_brother.song_name: How Am I Supposed To Live Without You

recommended.song_name: The Man Who Cant Be Moved

content:
Based on YouTube link: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=CmSQlenY6t4
transcribed by: Maestro Aleks

[Intro]
[tab]  [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]  [ch]F/Eb[/ch]     [ch]Bb/D[/ch]    [ch]F/G[/ch] [ch]Gm7[/ch] 
| •   •   •   •  | •   •   •    •   |[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]  [ch]F/Eb[/ch]     [ch]Bb2/D[/ch]   [ch]D7b9[/ch]
| •   •   •   •  | •   •   •    •   |[/tab]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                                   [ch]F/A[/ch]
   I could hardly believe it, when I heard the news today,[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Eb/G[/ch]            [ch]Ebm/Gb[/ch]                [ch]Bb/F[/ch]   [ch]F7/Eb[/ch] [ch]Bb/D[/ch] [ch]Bb/C[/ch]
I had to come and get it straight from you.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                                       [ch]F/A[/ch]
   They said you were leavin', someone's swept your heart away,[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Eb/G[/ch]           [ch]Ebm/Gb[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]Em7b5[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]F/Eb[/ch]
From the look upon your face  I see it's true.[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus 1]
[tab]   [ch]Bb2/D[/ch]                                                [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]
So tell me all about it, tell me 'bout the plans you're makin',[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Bb/D[/ch]  [ch]Cm7[/ch]                  [ch]Gm7[/ch]    [ch]Dm7[/ch]    [ch]Eb[/ch]   [ch]Fsus[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]
Oh,       tell me one thing more before I go.[/tab]

[Chorus 1]
[tab]        [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]      [ch]F/Eb[/ch]             [ch]Dm7[/ch]      [ch]Gm7[/ch]
Tell me how am I supposed to live without you,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]                   [ch]F/Eb[/ch]            [ch]Dm7[/ch]  [ch]Ab/Bb[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch]
      Now that I've been loving you so long?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]       [ch]F/Eb[/ch]             [ch]Dm7[/ch]      [ch]Gm7[/ch]
How am I supposed to live without you?[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Cm7[/ch]    [ch]Bb/D[/ch]  [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]         [ch]Eb/F[/ch]   [ch]F/G[/ch] [ch]Gm7[/ch]
And how am I  supposed to carry on,[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Cm7[/ch]       [ch]Bb2/D[/ch]     [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]  [ch]Eb/F[/ch]   ([ch]Ebmaj7[/ch])
When all that I've been livin'  for is gone.[/tab]

[Interlude]
[tab]  [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]  [ch]F/Eb[/ch]     [ch]Bb2/D[/ch]   [ch]D7b9[/ch] [ch]D7[/ch]
| •   •   •   •  | •   •   •    •   |[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                                  [ch]F/A[/ch]
   I'm too proud for cryin', didn't come here to break down,[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Eb/G[/ch]             [ch]Ebm/Gb[/ch]         [ch]Bb/F[/ch]   [ch]F7/Eb[/ch] [ch]Bb/D[/ch] [ch]Bb/C[/ch]
It's just a dream of mine is coming to an end.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                                [ch]F/A[/ch]
   And how can I blame you when I built my world around,[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Eb/G[/ch]            [ch]Ebm/Gb[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]          [ch]Em7b5[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]F/Eb[/ch]
The hope that one day, we'd be so much more than friends?[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus 2]
[tab][ch]Bb2/D[/ch]                                             [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]    [ch]Bb/D[/ch]
I don't wanna know the price I'm gonna pay for dreaming, oh[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm7[/ch]                [ch]Gm7[/ch]      [ch]Dm7[/ch]    [ch]Eb[/ch]    [ch]Fsus[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]
    Even now it's more than I can take.[/tab]

[Chorus 2]
[tab]        [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]      [ch]F/Eb[/ch]             [ch]Dm7[/ch]      [ch]Gm7[/ch]
Tell me how am I supposed to live without you,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]                   [ch]F/Eb[/ch]            [ch]Dm7[/ch]  [ch]Ab/Bb[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch]
      Now that I've been loving you so long?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]       [ch]F/Eb[/ch]             [ch]Dm7[/ch]      [ch]Gm7[/ch]
How am I supposed to live without you?[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Cm7[/ch]    [ch]Bb/D[/ch]  [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]         [ch]Eb/F[/ch]   [ch]F/G[/ch] [ch]Gm7[/ch]
And how am I  supposed to carry on,[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Cm7[/ch]       [ch]Bb2/D[/ch]     [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]  [ch]Eb/F[/ch]  ([ch]Bb[/ch])
When all that I've been livin'  for is gone.[/tab]

[Solo]
[tab]  [ch]Bb[/ch]    [ch]Bb2/D[/ch]   [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]  [ch]Fsus4[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]
| •  •  •  •  | •   •   •     •   |[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Gm7[/ch]   [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]  [ch]Fsus4[/ch]   [ch]Gm7[/ch]   [ch]F/A[/ch]
| •  •  •  •  | •   •   •     •   |[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Bb[/ch]    [ch]Bb2/D[/ch]   [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]  [ch]Fsus4[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]
| •  •  •  •  | •   •   •     •   |[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Eb2/G[/ch] [ch]F/A[/ch]     [ch]B/F#[/ch]    [ch]F#[/ch]    [ch]F#/E[/ch]
| •  •  •  •  | •   •   •     •   |[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus 3]
[tab]    [ch]B2/D#[/ch]                                             [ch]Emaj7[/ch]     [ch]B/D#[/ch]
Now I don't wanna know the price I'm gonna pay for dreaming, oh[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m7[/ch]           [ch]G#m7[/ch]      [ch]D#m7[/ch]       [ch]C#m7[/ch]   [ch]F#7sus[/ch]
     now that your dream has come true.[/tab]

[Chorus 3]
[tab]        [ch]Emaj7[/ch]       [ch]F#/E[/ch]             [ch]D#m7[/ch]      [ch]G#m7[/ch]
Tell me how am I supposed to live without you,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Emaj7[/ch]                   [ch]F#/E[/ch]            [ch]D#m7[/ch]  [ch]A/B[/ch] [ch]B[/ch]
     Now that I've been loving you so long?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Emaj7[/ch]          [ch]F#/E[/ch]              [ch]D#m7[/ch]      [ch]G#m7[/ch]
    How am I supposed to live without you?[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C#m7[/ch]    [ch]B/D#[/ch]  [ch]Emaj7[/ch]         [ch]E/F#[/ch]   [ch]F#/G#[/ch] [ch]G#m7[/ch]
And how am I  supposed to carry on,[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C#m7[/ch]      [ch]B/D#[/ch]      [ch]Emaj7[/ch]  [ch]E/F#[/ch]           [ch]Emaj7[/ch]
When all that I've been livin'  for...,    is gone.[/tab]
